_description: Artist watchlist for automated monitoring. Organized by popularity tier. Edit this file to add/remove artists without code changes.

_tiers.stadium: Major headliners, 40k+ capacity venues. 3 events per artist.
_tiers.arena: Arena-level acts, 10-25k capacity. 2 events per artist.
_tiers.theater: Theater/club-level acts, 1-5k capacity. 1 event per artist.
_tiers.emerging: Rising artists, smaller venues. 1 event per artist.
